title: onobrychis humilis subsp. jahandiezii
intro: Onobrychis humilis subsp. jahandiezii, also known as hairy bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species within the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis humilis subsp. jahandiezii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally or used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
